info.title: Gando Partner API v1
info.description: API for **rental management software** and **multi–rental-operator platforms** integrating Gando on behalf of linked rental operators. Use **`gando_pk_`** keys (`x-api-key` or `Authorization: Bearer`) on `/api/partner/v1/*`.

tags.name: Deposits
tags.description:
## Gando Partner API v1

Routes under `/api/partner/v1/*` use **partner API keys** only (`gando_pk_` prefix).

### Authentication

- Send the raw key in either:
  - Header **`x-api-key: gando_pk_…`**, or
  - Header **`Authorization: Bearer gando_pk_…`**
- Missing key or wrong prefix → **401** `error.code`: **`missing_api_key`**.
- Unknown key → **401** `error.code`: **`invalid_api_key`**.
- Revoked key → **401** `error.code`: **`api_key_revoked`**.

### Error responses (ErrorEnvelope)

All documented 4xx/5xx responses use the same JSON shape (`#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope`):

```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_request",
    "message": "Human-readable error message.",
    "requestId": "req_abc123"
  }
}
```

### Idempotency-Key (mutating POST)

Optional header on **`POST /api/partner/v1/deposits`**, **`POST /api/partner/v1/clients`**, **`POST /api/partner/v1/deposits/{id}/capture`**, and **`POST /api/partner/v1/deposits/{id}/cancel`**. Send a **UUID v4** per logical operation. Within **24 hours**, repeating the same key with the **same JSON body** returns the **cached HTTP status and response**. Reusing the key with a **different body** returns **409** with `error.code`: `idempotency_key_conflict`.

### curl (partner key)

```bash
curl -sS -X GET "https://gando.app/api/partner/v1/deposits?page=1&limit=20" \
  -H "x-api-key: gando_pk_YOUR_PARTNER_KEY"
```

### Migration from `/api/partner/*`

Legacy routes at `/api/partner/*` return `Deprecation: true` and `Sunset` headers pointing to this v1 API. Migrate before the sunset date to avoid 410 Gone responses.

tags.name: Clients
tags.description: Client management endpoints — create, list, retrieve and update clients.

tags.name: Accounts
tags.description: Rental operator account management — list linked accounts and revoke partner links.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description:
## Partner webhooks (v1)

Register **HTTPS endpoints** that receive JSON events for your entire partner integration (same `gando_pk_` authentication as `/api/partner/v1/*`). Use this instead of polling **`GET /api/partner/v1/accounts`** when you need the Gando **`accountId`** as soon as a rental operator completes partner connect.

### Authentication

Send your partner API key with **`x-api-key: gando_pk_…`** or **`Authorization: Bearer gando_pk_…`** (same as other v1 routes).

### Events

- **`rental_operator.linked`** — Fired when a rental operator account is linked to your partner via connect. Payload includes Gando `accountId`, your `externalId` from the connect URL, and `partnerId`.
- **`deposit.status_changed`** — Wildcard. Delivered for every deposit status transition (same JSON shape as `#/components/schemas/WebhookDepositStatusChangedEvent`), including optional `data.partnerContext` when the deposit belongs to a linked rental operator.
- **`deposit.activated`** — Delivered only when a deposit transitions to `active`.
- **`deposit.captured`** — Delivered only when a deposit transitions to `captured`.
- **`deposit.expired`** — Delivered only when a deposit transitions to `close` (natural end of contract).
- **`deposit.cancelled`** — Delivered only when a deposit transitions to `cancelled` (manual cancellation).

When a subscription includes both the wildcard and a specific event, **the most specific subscribed event wins** for that transition (single delivery per endpoint). The `event` field of the payload reflects the chosen event so consumers can branch on it directly.

### Signing and headers

**`X-Gando-Signature`** (`sha256=<hex>`), **`X-Gando-Timestamp`** (unix seconds), **`X-Gando-Event`** (event name). Verify HMAC-SHA256 over `<timestamp>.<rawBody>` with your **webhook signing secret** (returned once when you create the endpoint). See the **Webhooks** tag for full verification examples (Node.js, Python, PHP, Go).

### Retries

Failed deliveries are retried on a backoff schedule by Gando's webhook retry job.

PartnerApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
PartnerApiKeyAuth.description: Partner API key (`gando_pk_` prefix). Required for all `/api/partner/v1/*` routes.

PartnerBearerAuth.description: Same partner key as `PartnerApiKeyAuth`, sent as `Authorization: Bearer gando_pk_…`.

event.description: Webhook event name. Reflects the most specific subscribed event matched by this transition.

rentalContract.description: Rental contract reference set by the rental operator, if any

client.description: Client information if a client is attached to the deposit

externalId.description: Partner-side rental-operator / account identifier when available

partnerContext.description: Partner context for deposits created through Partner API Key flow. Present only for partner-linked deposits.

accountId.description: Gando rental operator account id — use as `accountId` in Partner API calls

externalId.description: Your external id from the partner connect URL, if provided

linkedAt.description: When the link was established (server time)

V1WebhookEventType.description: V1 webhook event types. `deposit.status_changed` is the wildcard delivered for every status transition. `deposit.activated` (-> active), `deposit.captured` (-> captured), `deposit.expired` (-> close), `deposit.cancelled` (-> cancelled) are specific events. `rental_operator.linked` fires when a rental operator account is linked to your partner via connect. When a subscription includes both the wildcard and a specific event, the most specific subscribed event wins for that transition (single delivery per endpoint).

code.description: Machine-readable error code — exhaustive enum in OpenAPI (`PartnerErrorCode`).

requestId.description: Request correlation ID — include in support tickets.

PartnerCreateClientBody.description: Create a client on a linked rental operator account. Shape depends on `clientType`. Idempotent by email within the account.

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 or local format

siren.description: French SIREN (9 digits), for business clients

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 or local format

siren.description: French SIREN (9 digits), for business clients

companyName.description: Legal or trade name (required for professionnel)

ProfessionnelClient.description: Create a business client. `companyName` is required.

PartnerClientPatchBody.description: Partial update of a partner-accessible client. At least one field is required.

ParticulierPartnerClientPatch.description: Patch an individual client. At least one field is required.

companyName.description: Updated company name (required when setting `clientType` to professionnel)

ProfessionnelPartnerClientPatch.description: Patch a business client. At least one field is required; `companyName` required when `clientType` is professionnel.

get.description: Returns rental operator accounts linked to your partner. Filter with `status`: `active` (default), `revoked`, or `all`.

schema.description: Filter linked accounts: `active` (default, operable links), `revoked` (disconnected), or `all`.

parameters.description: Filter linked accounts: `active` (default, operable links), `revoked` (disconnected), or `all`.
parameters.name: status

accountId.description: Gando rental operator account id. Use as `accountId` in Partner API calls.

externalId.description: Your external id from partner connect, when provided at link time

companyName.description: Legal or trade name of the rental operator

email.description: Primary contact email for the rental operator

linkedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the partner link was created

status.description: Partner link status: `active` (operations allowed) or `revoked` (403 on deposits)

accounts.description: Linked rental operator accounts for this partner

total.description: Total number of accounts matching the filter

400.description: Invalid query (e.g. invalid `status`)

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Forbidden — partner cannot access this resource.

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

delete.description: Revokes the link between your partner and the given rental operator `accountId`. Further deposit operations for that account return **403** until re-linked.

revokedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the link was revoked

400.description: Bad request — invalid parameters or business rule.

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Partner is not linked to this account

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

schema.description: Case-insensitive search on name, email, or company

parameters.description: Case-insensitive search on name, email, or company
parameters.name: search

clientType.description: Type of client: particulier (individual) or professionnel (business)

companyName.description: Company name (required if clientType is professionnel)

403.description: `accountId` is not linked to this partner

post.summary: Create a client for a linked rental operator account
post.description: Creates a client and returns its id. This id can then be sent as optional `clientId` in `POST /api/partner/v1/deposits`. This endpoint is idempotent by email within account: when a client already exists, it returns 200 with the existing id.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional UUID v4 for request deduplication (24h). Same key + same body replays the cached response; same key + different body returns 409 `idempotency_key_conflict`.

id.description: Created or existing client id (use as `clientId` on deposits)
Created or existing client id (use as `clientId` on deposits)

x-codeSamples.label: SDK

post.summary: Create a deposit for a linked rental operator
post.description:
Creates a deposit on behalf of a linked rental operator (`accountId` in body). Optionally set `clientId` to attach an existing client from the same rental operator account.

**URL generation:** set `depositUrlGeneration: true` and `returnUrl` to receive `depositUrl` and send the tenant straight to Gando.

**Idempotency-Key:** optional UUID v4 header; replays return the same **201** and `data.id` within 24h when the body is unchanged.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional UUID v4 for request deduplication (24h). Same key + same body replays the cached response; same key + different body returns 409 `idempotency_key_conflict`.

accountId.description: Rental operator account id. Must be actively linked to your partner.

amount.description: Deposit amount in euros. Floor: 70 EUR. Schema-level ceiling: 10 000 EUR (absolute). The effective per-call ceiling is the rental operator's negotiated max (default 2 500 EUR) — exceeding it returns 400 with the operator's resolved limit in the message.

rentalContract.description: Your rental contract or booking reference for reconciliation

contractStartAt.description: Contract start date (ISO 8601 or parseable date string)

contractEndAt.description: Contract end date. Must be on or after `contractStartAt`

clientId.description: Optional client id from `POST /api/partner/clients` on the same rental operator account

depositUrlGeneration.description: When true, response includes `depositUrl` for immediate tenant redirect

returnUrl.description: HTTPS return URL (localhost allowed). Required with inline checkout; Gando appends `depositId` and `depositStatus` query params

status.description: Status of the deposit: pending (waiting for next step), incomplete (client journey not finished), active (payment authorized), processing (being processed), captured (payment captured), close (deposit closed by natural expiration / end of contract), cancelled (deposit cancelled manually before activation or while active), payment_issue (payment issue at fee payment), capture_issue (capture/recovery issue)

depositUrl.description: Tenant checkout URL when `depositUrlGeneration` was true on create

400.description: Validation or creation error (JSON body, dates, amount limits, etc.)

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Partner is not linked to `accountId`

409.description: Idempotency key already used with a different request body (`error.code`: `idempotency_key_conflict`)

503.description: Redis unavailable while Idempotency-Key was sent

get.description:
Lists deposits across **all active** rental operator accounts linked to your partner.

Pass **`accountId`** query to return only deposits for that single linked rental operator account.

Repeat query parameter **`status`** to filter by several statuses (e.g. `?status=pending&status=active`).

When `includeCounts=true` **and** `accountId` is set, the response includes per-status counts for that account.

schema.description: When set, only deposits for this linked rental operator account (`accountId`)

parameters.description: When set, only deposits for this linked rental operator account (`accountId`)
parameters.name: accountId

schema.description: Field to sort deposit results by

parameters.description: Field to sort deposit results by
parameters.name: sortBy

items.description: Status of the deposit: pending (waiting for next step), incomplete (client journey not finished), active (payment authorized), processing (being processed), captured (payment captured), close (deposit closed by natural expiration / end of contract), cancelled (deposit cancelled manually before activation or while active), payment_issue (payment issue at fee payment), capture_issue (capture/recovery issue)

schema.description: Repeat `status` to filter by multiple deposit statuses

parameters.description: Repeat `status` to filter by multiple deposit statuses

parameters.description: Filter deposits assigned to this client id

reference.description: Unique reference code for the deposit

amount.description: Amount of the deposit in euros

status.description: Status of the deposit: pending (waiting for next step), incomplete (client journey not finished), active (payment authorized), processing (being processed), captured (payment captured), close (deposit closed by natural expiration / end of contract), cancelled (deposit cancelled manually before activation or while active), payment_issue (payment issue at fee payment), capture_issue (capture/recovery issue)

clientId.description: ID of the client associated with the deposit (optional, can be null)

accountId.description: ID of the account that owns the deposit

returnUrl.description: HTTPS return URL when set at deposit creation

startAt.description: Start date and time of the deposit (ISO 8601 format)

expiresAt.description: Expiration date and time of the deposit (ISO 8601 format)

updatedAt.description: Last update date and time (ISO 8601 format)

numPages.description: Total number of pages for the current `limit` (0 when `total` is 0)

total.description: Total deposits for the filtered account

counts.title: V1DepositListCounts
counts.description: Present only when `includeCounts=true` and `accountId` query is set

patch.summary: Update deposit (change client or cancel pending payment)
patch.description:
Exactly one of:
- `clientId` — reassign client (must belong to the deposit's rental operator account)
- `action: "cancel"` — void the in-flight deposit payment and set status to `cancelled`

clientId.description: Reassign deposit to another client on the same rental operator account

action.description: Void the in-flight deposit payment and set status to `cancelled` (not the same as POST …/cancel which closes an active deposit)

400.description: Invalid body or deposit state (e.g. no pending payment to cancel)

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Deposit not accessible for this partner

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

delete.description: Remove when allowed, otherwise archive. Response uses top-level **`message`** (`Deleted` or `Archived`), not `data`.

400.description: Bad request — invalid parameters or business rule.

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Forbidden for this deposit

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

post.description: Sets the deposit status to `close` (end-of-contract closure) and may send the closed-deposit email. **Different from** `PATCH …` with `action: cancel` which voids the in-flight deposit payment and sets status to `cancelled`.

get.description: Retrieve configured webhook endpoints for the authenticated partner. Each item aggregates subscribed event types. Results are paginated with **`page`** and **`limit`** query parameters (same semantics as **`GET /api/partner/v1/deposits`**).

id.description: Partner webhook endpoint id; path parameter `{id}` in update/delete/test/deliveries routes

items.description: V1 webhook event types. `deposit.status_changed` is the wildcard delivered for every status transition. `deposit.activated` (-> active), `deposit.captured` (-> captured), `deposit.expired` (-> close), `deposit.cancelled` (-> cancelled) are specific events. `rental_operator.linked` fires when a rental operator account is linked to your partner via connect. When a subscription includes both the wildcard and a specific event, the most specific subscribed event wins for that transition (single delivery per endpoint).

403.description: Forbidden — partner cannot access this resource.

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

post.description: Create a webhook URL and signing secret for this partner, and subscribe it to the requested event types. Returns the plain signing secret **exactly once**. Default `events` include all available events when omitted.

url.description: Destination URL (must start with http:// or https://)

items.description: Partner webhook event types. `rental_operator.linked` fires when a rental operator account is linked to your partner via connect. The five deposit events mirror rental-operator webhooks: `deposit.status_changed` is the wildcard delivered for every status transition; `deposit.activated` (-> active), `deposit.captured` (-> captured), `deposit.expired` (-> close, natural end of contract), `deposit.cancelled` (-> cancelled, manual cancellation) are the specific events. When an endpoint subscribes to both the wildcard and a specific event, the most specific subscribed event wins for that transition (single delivery per endpoint).

events.description: Event types to subscribe. Defaults to all partner events when omitted.

id.description: Partner webhook endpoint id (use as `{id}` in follow-up routes)

items.description: V1 webhook event types. `deposit.status_changed` is the wildcard delivered for every status transition. `deposit.activated` (-> active), `deposit.captured` (-> captured), `deposit.expired` (-> close), `deposit.cancelled` (-> cancelled) are specific events. `rental_operator.linked` fires when a rental operator account is linked to your partner via connect. When a subscription includes both the wildcard and a specific event, the most specific subscribed event wins for that transition (single delivery per endpoint).

secret.description: Plain signing secret. Returned only once at creation (store it securely).

post.description:
Sends a sample **`deposit.activated`** payload to the endpoint URL. The endpoint must be subscribed to either `deposit.activated` or the wildcard `deposit.status_changed`.

Sample payload sent by this test and the production dispatcher:

```json
{
  "event": "deposit.activated",
  "createdAt": "2026-03-02T10:00:00.000Z",
  "data": {
    "id": "dep_test_abc123",
    "reference": "GAN-TEST",
```

statusCode.description: HTTP status code returned by your webhook URL

400.description: Bad request — invalid parameters or business rule.

401.description: Invalid or missing partner API key.

403.description: Webhook does not belong to your partner

409.description: Conflict — e.g. idempotency key reused with a different body.

500.description: Server error (e.g. endpoint not subscribed to deposit.activated or deposit.status_changed)

502.description: Delivery failed (connection error or non-2xx from your URL)

get.description: Paginated delivery history for a partner webhook endpoint.

nextRetryAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the next retry, if scheduled
